_provenance: Initial baseline carries the DistilBERT final-test-split metrics (n=2539 on processed/pandas/20260519T133455Z/test.parquet) so the CI gate is honest about the deployed classifier's quality without requiring a fresh measurement on the 25-example golden set at commit time. The operator must run `--measure` against the deployed run (MODEL_RUN_ID=20260520T193153Z) and overwrite this file with golden-set-measured numbers before the next model change; the golden_set_hash check enforces that workflow.
